    E

    e(String, String) - Static method in class lcr.util.Log
    Prints a standardized error tracking alert message to standard error (stderr) if the global runtime logging visibility toggle is enabled.
    EAST_TESTER - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.SupportedMeter
     
    ECAP - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.PrimaryParameter
     
    EMPTY - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.SecondaryParameter
     
    EQUIVALENT_SERIES_RESISTANCE - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.DerivateCapacitance
     
    ESR - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.SecondaryParameter
     
    ET431Exception - Exception Class in lcr
    Custom exception representing hardware communication errors, parsing failures, or command transmission timeout exceptions specific to the East Tester ET431 LCR meter control layer.
    ET431Exception(String) - Constructor for exception class lcr.ET431Exception
    Constructs a new ET431Exception with the specified descriptive error message detail payload.
    ETMeter - Class in lcr.business
    Implementation of the LcrMeter interface handling SCPI command communication over a serial connection for the ET431 series hardware.
    ETMeter(String) - Constructor for class lcr.business.ETMeter
    Initializes the meter with a target serial port name.
    execute(String) - Method in class lcr.business.ETMeter
     
    execute(String) - Method in class lcr.business.HiokiMeter
     
    execute(String) - Method in interface lcr.business.LcrMeter
    Sends a raw SCPI command to the meter and reads its string response.
    execute(String) - Method in class lcr.business.SerialConnection
    Performs a synchronized thread-safe transaction sequence that flushes old traces, transmits a text payload command, and tracks SCPI error returns.
    execute(String) - Method in class lcr.business.TonghuiMeter
